title: Elemental Amulets
description: Adds amulets that give various buffs and much more!
body:
Elemental Amulets — a mod that adds amulets, powerful and cool looking necklaces!
Control the elements in your favor!

Escape from enemies with the help of a amulet of speed and jump boost, take a hot shower in the nether with a fire-resistance amulet, travel deep into  and etc! New mechanic - Elemental combination, with which you can mix the elements with anything! The Jeweller and the elemental guide will help you on your journey.

 

Also, with full customization and full JEI support, you can put this mod into any modpack! Change the values using the configuration, view, add and remove recipes!

 

This mod is currently in stable beta! All core features are working, so feel free to use it in modpack!

 

 

List of currently added amulets:

  1. Amulet of Fire-Resistance - protects from fire and on higher levels from lava!
  2. Amulet of Water  - makes you breathe underwater(tier 2+) and swim faster!
  3. Amulet of Air  - makes you fall slow
  4. Amulet of Terra-Protection - creates magical shield around you that protects from damage
  5. Amulet of Jump-Boost - makes you jump higher
  6. Amulet of Invisibility - makes you invisible
  7. Amulet of Speed-Boost - boosts your speed
  8. Amulet of Earth - boosts plants and improves the yield
  9. Pacifying Amulet - passive mobs won't get angry at you(e.g endermans and zombified piglins)
  10. Amulet of Knockback - very straightforward, pushes your attackers.

and many other amulets yet to be added!

 

FAQ:

Q: Why does this mod has a lot of downloads?
A: I’ve created this mod a long time ago, and then abandoned it. After some time I removed all files and started fresh

 

Compatibility with other mods:

This mod should be compatible with most mods, since it’s not changing anything global.
If you found that some mod is not compatible with mine, please report this issue to me and other mod’s creator!

Suggestions:

If you have an idea, feel free to leave comment or create a new pull request on github(only if you want to make it yourself)

All ideas are welcome!

Also please don’t repost this mod! https://stopmodreposts.org

I’m not going to sue you, but please just not.
